final:
// // This module selects between two inputs based on the select signal. When select is 0, output is i1; when select is 1, output is i0.
module top_module(
    input  i0,
    input  i1,
    input  select,
    output reg d
    );always @(i0,i1,select)
    begin
        d = 0;
        
        if(select == 1'b0) begin
            d = i0;
        end
        else if(select == 1'b1) begin
            d = i1;
        end
    end    
    
endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module selects between two inputs based on the select signal. When select is 0, output is i1; when select is 1, output is i0.
